name: robrain
description: RoBrain CLI for installation, setup, and memory workflows
author: Rory Plans, Inc.

scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm build && node scripts/verify-release-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/vendor-sensing-mcp.mjs && node scripts/vendor-hermes-plugin.mjs && node scripts/vendor-codex-hooks.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm build && node --test dist/lib/editor.codex.test.js dist/lib/release-guard.test.js dist/lib/mcp-bundle.test.js dist/lib/control-bundle.test.js dist/lib/claude-plugin.test.js dist/lib/hermes-plugin.test.js dist/lib/codex-hooks.test.js dist/commands/outcomes.test.js dist/commands/export-interchange.test.js dist/commands/up.test.js dist/commands/mcp.test.js dist/commands/install.test.js
